positive: A central, symmetrical illustration of futuristic bioluminescent flora and stylized cosmic foliage. The artwork must feature detailed, intricate linework combined with bold, clean silhouettes suitable for apparel printing. The composition is highly graphic and elegant, designed for high contrast screen printing. Utilize a primary palette of deep midnight blue and vibrant electric cyan, accented by subtle glowing lime green highlights. The overall style is a blend of modern scientific etching, Art Nouveau curves, and minimalist celestial design. The background must be negative space, isolating the subject completely.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, noise, messy, distorted, text, watermark, signature, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, grain, gradient, realism, photorealistic
